AFEnumerationValue.Name: All
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Overwrite the primary calculation and its dependents.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: None
AFEnumerationValue.Description: No overwriting, only fill-in missing timestamps when backfilling

AFEnumerationValue.Name: PrimaryOnly
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Overwrite the primary calculation only. Fill-in the gaps of any dependent calculations.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Error
AFEnumerationValue.Description: An error was returned during the backfilling process and the backfilling stopped and has been placed in an error state

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Finished
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Backfilling has successfully run for the backfilling parameters and has completed the backfilling

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Off
AFEnumerationValue.Description: No backfilling is running or requested

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Requested
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Request backfilling for the given backfilling parameters

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Running
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Backfilling is in progress

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Bad
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Bad state.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: BadInput
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Interfaces use this state to indicate that a device is reporting bad status.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CalcFailed
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation Failed state.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CalcOff
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculations Off state.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CalculationNameUnknown
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The ComponentName parameter is not known on the server.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CalculationServerInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The CalculationServer parameter is incorrectly configured.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CalculationStateInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The CalculationState parameter is not a PI Point, or the PI Point is not available or is not a digital state type.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CircularDependencyChain
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The Calculation is part of a circular dependency chain.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CommFail
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Comm Fail state.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: ConfigurationError
AFEnumerationValue.Description: General Calculation configuration error - missing PI Points or Attributes are unexpected datatypes.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: DependentInputsNotReady
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation's Dependent inputs do not have timestamps available for the checked output time

AFEnumerationValue.Name: ExecutionFrequencyInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The execution frequency is set to 0 or is missing for a Cyclic calculation.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Good
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Good state.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: InputConfigInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: An input configuration is not defined properly.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: InputTimeRangeInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: An input’s RelativeTimeRange is not valid.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: LastCalcTimeInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The LastCalculationTime parameter is not a Pi Point, or the PI Point is not available.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: LogNameInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The LogName is not a valid file name.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NetworkError
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Network error while reading inputs

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NoData
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Data-retrieval functions use this state for time periods where no archive values for a tag can exist 10 minutes into the future or before the oldest mounted archive.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NoLabData
AFEnumerationValue.Description: No Lab Data.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NoResult
AFEnumerationValue.Description: No Result.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: OutputConfigInvalid
AFEnumerationValue.Description: An output does not specify a valid or reachable PI Point.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: OverRange
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Indicates a value that is greater than the top of range (Zero+Span) for that tag.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: QueueTimeout
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The Calculation remained in the queue for too long.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: RetiredCalculationDependency
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The Calculation is dependent on a retired Calculation.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: ServerOffline
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The CalculationServer cannot be reached.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: UnderRange
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Indicates a value that is less than the zero for the tag.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: UnhandledException
AFEnumerationValue.Description: The calculation failed and did not handle the error internally.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: ConfigurationError
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation is in a configuration error state. Calculation configuration must be reviewed and fixed before the Calculation will run. See Calculation's Last Error for more information.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Disabled
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation is temporarily disabled, to allow for fixes before re-enabling.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: FetchingData
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation input data is being retrieved.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Idle
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation has been assigned to a Coordinator and is not yet running.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NotAssigned
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation has not been assisgned to a Coordinator by a Configurator yet.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Queued
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation is waiting to execute, either for a data change, or time.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Retired
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation has been retired and should no longer be executed by a Coordinator.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Running
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation function is currently executing.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: SystemDisabled
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation has errored for 2 or more consecutive times, and has been set to disabled by the system.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: WritingOutputs
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calculation output is being written to the archive.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Event
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Runs in response to CCETrigger input data changes

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Manual
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Runs only when user sets BackfillState to Requested

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Periodic
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Runs at an ExecutionFrequency

AFEnumerationSet.Name: CCELogLevel
AFEnumerationSet.Description: Log level and below principle is used.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: All
AFEnumerationValue.Description: All messages

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Debug
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Debug messages and all below.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Error
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Error; code is likely to have failed.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Info
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Informative messages

AFEnumerationValue.Name: None
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Log no messages

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Trace
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Trace messages. Significant detail.

AFEnumerationValue.Name: Warning
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Warnings; code will continue

AFEnumerationValue.Name: CalcFailed
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Calc Failed system state

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NaN
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Value kept as a NaN

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NoOutput
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Output not written for that timestamp

AFEnumerationValue.Name: NoResult
AFEnumerationValue.Description: No Result system state

AFEnumerationValue.Name: SetToBad
AFEnumerationValue.Description: Set To Bad system state

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: BackfillingParameters
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Parameters controlling backfilling

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: BackfillEndTime
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Time until data should be available if backfilling has been requested

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: BackfillLastError
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: LastError returned from backfilling run

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: BackfillOverwrite
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: If enabled, existing data from the calculation will be replaced, if disabled, data will be filled around existing data.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: BackfillProgress
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Indication of Backfill Progression during Backfill run

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: BackfillStartTime
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Time from which data should be available if backfilling has been requested

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: BackfillState
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Shows the state of the backfilling in CCE

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: MissedRunsThreshold
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Number of missed runs before lag is detected

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: SkipBackfill
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: If enabled auto backfill is disabled for highly lagging calcs

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: CalculationName
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: The name of the calculation function to execute - defined by the calculation template using string builder.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: CalculationServer
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: String of the server the calculation will execute on

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: CalculationState
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Shows the state of the calculation in CCE.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: ComponentName
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: The archive name the coordinator will use to call the function in the prod server.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: CoordinatorID
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Identifier of the Coordinator running this calculation

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: ExecutionParameters
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Parameters controlling calculation execution

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: ExecutionFrequency
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Period of execution for Periodic Coordinator; NaN for Event-based, Single or Manual ExecutionMode

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: ExecutionIndex
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Index for dependent calculations.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: ExecutionMode
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Enumeration representing current calculation status

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: ExecutionOffset
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Time for the first calculation result after midnight.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: LastCalculationTime
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Datetime of when the calculation was last run successfully

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: LastError
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Last Error returned from the calculation

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: LogParameters
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Parameters controlling logging

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: CalculationID
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Unique identifier used for calculation logging.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: LogLevel
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Enumeration list in order: debug, info, warning, error - will log to selected level and above.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: LogName
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Name of logfile.

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: RequestToDisable
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: Request that the Coordinator disable this calculation ASAP

AFAttributeTemplate.Name: WriteNanAs
AFAttributeTemplate.Description: What should NaN values be written as

AFAnalysisTemplate.Name: CCECalculationDisabledBySystem
AFAnalysisTemplate.Description: Event frame capturing System Disabling for CCE Calculations
